mapper.select: SELECT sf.error_bits FROM sensor_frame sf WHERE sf.panel_id = #{panelId} ORDER BY sf.frame_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.circuit_id, c.channel_no, latest_sfc.device_arc_flag, latest_ai.verdict AS latest_ai_verdict FROM circuit c LEFT JOIN sensor_frame_circuit latest_sfc ON latest_sfc.reading_id = ( SELECT MAX(sfc.reading_id) FROM sensor_frame_circuit sfc WHERE sfc.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) LEFT JOIN ai_diagnosis_result latest_ai ON latest_ai.result_id = ( SELECT MAX(ai.result_id) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai WHERE ai.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) WHERE c.panel_id = #{panelId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.channel_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE panel SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
